= Game modification =
[[OpenLieroX]] can be modified.

There are several ways of modifying the game

* [[Level Making]]
* [[Scripting|Mod Scripting]]
* [[Frontend Making]]
* [[Skin|Skinning]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100914071932/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Game_modification -->
